description: I manage a retraining center that offers online and in-person courses. Our customer support needs have doubled in the last year, with constant requests for assistance with enrollment, financial aid applications, payment processing, and technical problems with the online platform. Squaretalk provides reliable call management, IVR for after-hours and holidays, queue callbacks, and call transfers, which allow us to handle larger call volumes and resolve issues faster.
author: Bharat S.
pros: The Click-to-Call CRM integration and the advanced call-handling features help us personalize our services and improve retention.
cons: I’ve never had any serious issues. Their support is good.

review_title: Overall a positive experience with Squaretalk
description: I would definitely recommend SquareTalk, one of the few platforms where everything is transparent and working
author: Feri V.
pros: First of all I would like to appreciate our Account Manager [sensitive content hidden] , whenever we need help, advice or something, she helps us as much as she can, when something is wrong she writes us back as soon as she can, absolutely top notch AM I would also like to appreciate the chat support which is directly on the platform which has made our work easier and faster many times when there was a issue
cons: High rates on some destinations, SMS not working

description: Squaretalk has made it very for us to ask for help. We appreciate that there is a whatsapp group that replies very quickly
author: Kevin H.
pros: Their ease of use, and timely support. Squaretalk has made it easy to understand their platform and to ask for guidance
cons: The fact you can't run a spam check on more than 30 numbers at a time, leading you to have to check 30, then go to the next 30 and check them, and so forth.

review_title: Horrible, not working, and not even refunding or replying to refund requests
author: Alexander L.
pros: The way its being massively oversold by a highly qualified sales person. It's a cool dude, but once the sale is made and nothing is working, it's not possible to contact this guy.
cons: It never worked. The guys couldn't like this [SENSITIVE CONTENT] to our internet or something. Support was worthless, again not helping at all. After 2 weeks of wasting a lot of time on this, I decided to just give up an not waste energy on this bs anymore. Again, the team was very very unprofessional, not refunding the pilot money, though I've never been able to use it. Wasted my time, my resources, and this is the type of service you can expect from these fellows.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Forecasting and staffing made easier Job Title: Contact Center Director
description: We used to struggle with both overstaffing and understaffing, which impacted costs and customer experience. With better visibility into call volume trends, our scheduling is now much more accurate, and our service levels are more consistent across the board.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The performance and call volume data provided by Squaretalk has significantly improved the way we plan staffing. We can now anticipate busy periods and schedule agents in advance, instead of constantly reacting to unexpected spikes in demand.
cons: I’d like to see more advanced workforce management features built directly into the platform, especially around forecasting and scheduling

description: Our previous on-premise system couldn't handle surges in call volumes reliably, leading to frequent downtime issues. By contrast, Squaretalk's cloud-based reliability even during 150+ daily calls is impressive, with minimal latency or drops.
author: mathew S.
pros: I really value how customizable Squaretalk's reporting and workflows are without needing technical resources.
cons: While the self-service portal covers basics, expanding those capabilities further would maximize convenience.

review_title: The best manager of your support department
description: Squaretalk was a game changer for us, we shifted from an software which used to charge extra for every feature but squaretalk was game changer for us.
author: Paras G.
pros: squaretalk have most of the features we need their instant messsaging and auto dialer were actually great addons, also their auto spam detection made it easier for our team to manage call much more efficiently.
cons: The only thing i want improved is their ui and add some modes. also they can work on lag issues when our agents shifts between calls it sometime lags.

description: Great phone calls quality, very easy for using and administering, as well as custom integrations. Having in mind all of these, great collaboration for the past almost two years.
author: Dejan G.
pros: Value for money and amazing customer support in short. Low phone call prices, special prices for EU zone. Customer support that can be called instant support.
cons: They still do not have a mobile app. As per my information, they are working on it, so this expectation will be covered soon.

description: We switched software because of consistent call problems, including dropped calls, bad audio, and connection delays. The customer service was very slow to reply and never after their business hours. We’ve seen none of these issues with Squaretalk. We have the advanced VoIP features we need without additional fees and the support is 24/7.
author: Aditya S.
pros: The sales rep was very helpful and offered us a better price than other companies we spoke to. He really listened to our needs and requirements and worked to get us as much as possible for our money. I was very surprised that the deployment and support people were equally helpful.
cons: I just wish if they had an app, but overall everything else is okay

description: Squaretalk has improved our ability to manage sales calls and customer support. It’s made our team more efficient, and the automation tools have saved us a lot of time. The platform’s affordability has also helped us stay within budget while getting the features we need.
author: Shivsankar U.
pros: The platform offers great value for the price. We get a lot of functionality without having to pay a premium. The call management features are particularly useful for our sales team.
cons: I haven’t encountered any major problems so far.

description: Squaretalk eliminates the complexity of coordinating a large remote workforce. The cloud-based solution gives flexibility while performance tracking and real-time monitoring drive productivity gains. It allows us to optimize output and enhance customer experience.
author: Hansika K.
pros: I appreciate Squaretalk's scalability and ability to efficiently manage large, distributed teams. The customizable analytics provide actionable insights to measure performance across agents and campaigns. This helps us quickly identify areas for improvement.
cons: I have not experienced any major disadvantages so far. The platform has met our current needs.

description: We use Squaretalk to connect with a large number of leads. Its settings let us segment our audience and fine-tune campaigns, while the AI dialer and voicemail detection make sure our agents focus on real conversations, not just ringing phones.
author: Oliver J.
pros: The softphone saves us from using a separate app.
cons: I haven’t found any significant problem, few minor issues were solved by our team.

review_title: This is just what our company needed
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The team provided thorough explanation of the systems and conducted themselves with utmost professionalism. Their offer to let us test the system independently for a few hours was exceptional and greatly satisfied our tech team. The synergy between the two softwares is impressive and filled a huge gab in our internal processes. The sales process was remarkably smooth and efficient.
cons: In a perfect world it would have been a single system but I'm not technical enough to know if this is possible.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: fantastic communication platform with variety of tools
description: overall experience using this software is really amazing I requested all my staff and other teams within the organization to use this for simple and less expensive
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: the best thing which I love to use is customer services tools for communication and collaboration within the team and with customer
cons: integration with other tools are quite complex but form my team there is no issue raised for this yet so its not a big deal for us

description: The Squaretalk Platform has great call management and helps the team be fore efficient. We an use one program and integrate this rather than using multiple programs to complete one task. Our agents take many calls and needed this software to be able to take more calls during the day. This software helps create more business for my company and helps us continue to grow rapidly.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The Squaretalk Platform is a top-notch program and I would recommend it to anyone in my network. Our QA team said it’s easy to pull calls to review. I like that you can integrate it with the current programs you have. The agents are able to call with ease and rarely run into issues. They welcome feedback and continue to evolve the program. It is very reliable and the pricing structure fits my company and is a great deal.
cons: The platform continues to grow and is not perfect yet. I wish it was implemented with more software platforms, but what it currently is implemented in works great for my group.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I've been using Squaretalk for our communication needs for quite some time now, and I can confidently say it's been a game-changer for our business. From its intuitive interface to it's impeccable call quality, Squaretalk has exceeded our expectations in every aspect. Compared to other other systems we have used in the past, Squaretalk offers a very wekk-designed UI, with good support from the sales process, to the deployment of our server and to handling us over to our account manager.
cons: Nothing negative to say so far. I'm very satisfied with the service.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The strongest points of Squaretalk are the number of features and the customer service, far better than the average of the industry.
cons: The customization of the leads management system.

review_title: A good system integrated into your crm
author: Sandra C.
pros: The system is easy to use, it is simple and practical. From the pms with a single click I can call my clients without having to use dialing. It has many other functions, which I don't really use, but it will certainly work for other businesses. The support is really excellent, the communication is fast and effective.
cons: So far I have no criticism of the system; except for two brief moments when the system failed to convert the call. Specific cases, without a doubt.

description: I am very happy so far with the level of service and the product serve our needs
author: David M.
pros: 24 hour support, reasonable rate, easy deployment
cons: changing did's is quite expensive for my liking, checking spam numbers cost a fee as well
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Dimitris G.
pros: I like the most that it's easy to use or set it up and support is always there for any request and any problem you have.
cons: i can't find something that i like least or dislike.

description: I just made one call as a test via Squaretalk, and it worked perfectly.
author: Carlos D.
pros: I just made one call as a test via Squaretalk, and it worked perfectly.
cons: I wasn`t sure what prefix to use it, but the Customer Service from Squaretalk solved my problem
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great experience, friendly helpful staff that goes the extra mile
author: Nick S.
pros: Customer Service was great. Very responsive and always willing to help
cons: Takes some getting used to learning the platform
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Bartosz K.
pros: I really like the possibility of integration using workflow with other external applications
cons: it is not possible to export selected columns in call history
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Can't see how I worked without it before, very productive has all the UI requiered for any user to easily access, calls alot of clients at the same time, and gives you fast and quick results, it's very important for any call center to have this kind of assistance. This program can make everyone's work easier, and also is very good at marketing purposes. works on all of our systems with awesome intergration.
author: Kobi L.
pros: The quick response, efficiency, and the quality.
cons: I don't think anything is bad

description: Very simple and easy to use. No problems as i used to have with other providers. Work very well, even with bad internet connection. The cost is good.
author: Kern E.
pros: EASY TO USE, RAPID, WORKS WELL
